All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

U

updateData(List<Map<String, String>>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EntrantAdapter
Updates the adapter's data and refreshes the list.
updateEvent(Event, Uri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<Void>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Updates an existing event in Firestore.
updateEvent_withoutPoster_updatesSuccessfully() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that updateEvent saves the updated event successfully when no new poster image is provided.
updateExistingEvent() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Reads the updated event information from the input fields, validates the input, creates an updated Event object, and saves the changes to Firebase.
updateSpotsUI() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Calculates the remaining spots available by subtracting the current waitlist count from the Waitlist capacity limit, and updates the UI TextView accordingly.
updateSwitchThumbColor(boolean) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
Updates the thumb color of the switch (Green for enabled, Red for disabled).
updateToggleButton() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Toggles the UI state of the waitlist button, changing its text and color depending on whether the current user is already on the waiting list.
uploadPosterAndSave(Event, Uri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Uploads a poster image to Firebase Storage and then saves the event.
uploadPosterButton - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
 
uploadPosterButton - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
 
uploadPosterButton_isEnabled() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that the upload poster button is enabled when the screen opens.
uploadPosterButton_isEnabled() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that the upload poster button is enabled.
